name: aclymate
description: Estimate your business's carbon footprint, look up emission factors, understand GHG Protocol scopes, and benchmark against industry peers — powered by Aclymate.
long_description: Aclymate is the carbon accounting platform built for small and mid-sized businesses. This extension brings Aclymate's SMB carbon accounting data directly into Claude — estimate Scope 1/2/3 footprints by industry and size, look up emission factors with source citations, explain GHG Protocol scopes for any industry, and benchmark a company's emissions against peers. Powered by Aclymate's Climate Brain knowledge system.

tools.name: estimate_emissions
tools.description: Estimate the annual carbon footprint (tCO2e) for a business — Scope 1/2/3 breakdown and biggest emission drivers

tools.name: explain_scope
tools.description: Explain GHG Protocol Scope 1, 2, or 3 emissions in the context of a specific industry

tools.name: get_emission_factor
tools.description: Look up the emission factor for a specific activity in kg CO2e per unit, with source and caveats

tools.name: compare_business_footprint
tools.description: Benchmark a company's carbon footprint against industry peers
